title: Publish Queue
description: The ordered list of articles to generate and publish for a given week, produced at the end of W-01 Intelligence Scan.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this queue was built.

week_of.description: ISO week identifier for this queue (e.g. 2026-W14).

site_url.description: Client site URL for this deployment.

total_items.description: Total number of items in the queue.

fast_track_count.description: Number of items eligible for auto-publish.

items.description: Ordered list of articles to generate, highest priority first.

keyword.description: Primary target keyword for this article.

priority.description: Priority tier from the opportunity matrix.

fast_track.description: Whether this article is eligible for auto-publish bypass.

aeo_question.description: Primary AEO question to answer in this article.

recommended_action.description: Whether to create a new article or optimize an existing one.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of this queue item.

brief_id.description: Sanity contentBrief document ID, populated after W-02 creates the brief.

article_id.description: Sanity article document ID, populated after publish.

queued_at.description: When this item was added to the queue.

published_at.description: When this article was published to Sanity.

kill_reason.description: If status is killed, the reason provided by the AEO validator or reviewer.

summary.description: Aggregate stats for this queue (for Telegram weekly report).
